name_en: Top-tier original factory with full packaging
name_cn:
Top-tier original factory with full packaging
New Dior Groove 20cm bag in pink leather oblique
This Dior Groove 20 bag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear collection and is adorned with gold-finished stars, making it unique. The bag opens with a zip lock and key charm. The spacious compartment features an open pocket and a zip pocket for various daily essentials. It comes with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap,
Model: 8809
Dimensions: 20.5x13.5x12cm
